message:
🐛 Improve missions browse resilience and diagnostics (#1557)

- Add null safety to matchesMission helper (title/description fallbacks)
- Add diagnostic logging in Go handler when GitHub token fallback and
  unauthenticated retry both fail, making expired token issues visible
  in server logs instead of silently returning 403

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
